content:
# Embedding Separation: Implementation Learning (2026-03-30)
## Skip_serializing propagates to ALL serialization paths
When adding `#[serde(skip_serializing)]` to a field, it affects every serde path: JSON files, Redb ENTRIES table, AND staging files. This required companion `.vec` files for staging (to preserve embeddings between write and merge) and `get_embedding()` on the QueryableStore trait (for merge worker and commit pipeline to restore embeddings before re-insert).

## Code paths that read-then-write entries need embedding restoration
Any flow that reads an entry from the store and re-inserts it (merge worker's `process_one`, commit pipeline's status update, GC worker) will lose the embedding unless it explicitly reads from the VECTORS table first. Added `get_embedding()` to the trait to make this pattern clean.
